manifest.name: Vbu Smoke
manifest.description: Smoke test for vibe_studio runtime's vbu_* custom widgets. Renders VbuPaneHeader, VbuPill, VbuSystemNote, VbuFormSection, VbuLabelledField, VbuLabelledToggle, VbuBusyIndicator and VbuStatusbar in a single page so a one-glance look at the activated tab confirms the runtime registration is live.
